title: STOP Using Claude Code Without This Fable 5 Agentic OS
summary: Chase AI demonstrates how to build a custom Claude Code Agentic OS with architecture, memory, and observability components. The video covers setup in three steps, references a JARVIS system, and provides guidance on skills customization to maximize Claude Code efficiency.
writeup: Chase AI walks through building a custom Agentic OS on top of Claude Code, combining architecture, memory, and observability components. The setup is broken into three steps and references a JARVIS system, with guidance on customizing skills. The takeaway is a structured configuration meant to improve Claude Code efficiency through persistent memory and visibility into agentic workflows.
